prompt: stage4 的 offer 证伪测试跑失败了，evaluator 判了 wrong_reasoning，帮我分析一下

assertions.text: Agent finds and reads the most recent reflexion log file
Agent identifies the evaluator's specific failure reason (wrong_reasoning)
Agent traces through the agent's step-by-step tool calls in the log
Agent proposes a concrete fix (specific file + what to change), not just vague advice
